Name: Write File
Description: Writes content to a file on disk.

EventOutputs.Name: WriteComplete
EventOutputs.Description: Fires when file is written successfully

SettingsInputs.Name: Append
SettingsInputs.Description: Append to existing file instead of overwriting

SettingsInputs.Name: LineEnding
SettingsInputs.Description: Force line ending style: "lf", "crlf", or empty for no conversion

StateOutputs.Name: FileLocation
StateOutputs.Description: The path the file was referenced at (may be relative)

StateOutputs.Name: FileName
StateOutputs.Description: The name of the file only (no directory)

StateOutputs.Name: FilePath
StateOutputs.Description: The fully resolved absolute path of the file
